title: IGIDR Publication:Tackling India’s jobs plight: Underutilised levers and lessons from China by Alicia García Herrero (Natixis Bank) and Rajeswari Sengupta (IGIDR, Mumbai)
description: NO : WP-2026-002 AUTHOR : Alicia García Herrero (Natixis Bank) and Rajeswari Sengupta (IGIDR, Mumbai) TITLE : Tackling India’s jobs plight: Underutilised levers and lessons from China ABSTRACT : Despite strong GDP growth and favourable demographics, India faces an impending jobs crisis.
